Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC523 "AMERICANEXPRESS-83D0-C523" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $83d0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "American Express.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $83D0 which:
1. Copies 512 bytes of data from $EB00 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. 2. Sets CIA#1 Timer A ($DC0E) and Timer B ($DC0F) control registers to $01 to allow the game to run correctly. 3. Jumps to the entry point at $C523 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
